title: Numbers
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'number'?
Why do we have numbers?
Are you a number?
What are the important numbers in your life?
Can you easily remember telephone and license plate (car registration) numbers?
Do you have a lucky and unlucky number?
What numbers do you look at every day?
Would you like a job in which you had to work with numbers?
What are the happy numbers in your life?
Have you ever been, or are you now, number one?
Are you good with numbers?
Why is the number of your cash card called a PIN number - it becomes a 'Personal Identification Number number'?
What do you think of the number 100?
What do you think of the number 1,000,000?
Would you live in house number 13 (or number 4 in China/Japan)?
Would you be interested in studying numerology?
What's the difference between a number and numeral?
What is the number of the beast? Are you worried about this number
What does the verb 'number' mean? Do you ever number things?
What does it mean if "your days are numbered"?
